# X Twitter Scraper Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "x-twitter-scraper" {
  api_key = "My API Key"
  bearer_token = "My Bearer Token"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String)
- `base_url` (String) Set the base url that the provider connects to.
- `bearer_token` (String)
